items.title: @americanair.bsky.social your operations were deplorable tonight.
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
@americanair.bsky.social your operations were deplorable tonight. 

3 hour delay out of MIA because of a mechanical issue. Then 30 minutes.  waiting for the jetbridge at SFO. 

I used to be Concierge key. But I’m done.

When I die I want you to be a pallbearer..

Let me down one last time  💯

items.title: This is like knowing you have to be prepared for a hurricane coming and you’re watching everyone else hit the grocery store while you wait and see. I hope the shelves aren’t too empty when the storm arrives.
items.author: Kerith Burke
items.body_excerpt: This is like knowing you have to be prepared for a hurricane coming and you’re watching everyone else hit the grocery store while you wait and see. I hope the shelves aren’t too empty when the storm arrives.

images.alt: The angst from some portions of the Golden State Warriors' fan base about different free agents coming off the board right now is comical. If you have the chance to land LeBron James — you wait to see what he decides. If he doesn't sign in the Bay, then you look elsewhere and figure it out.

items.title: Sources: A little less than half of the WNBA player body submitted voting ballots for starters ahead of this month's All-Star Game.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
Sources: A little less than half of the WNBA player body submitted voting ballots for starters ahead of this month's All-Star Game.

Some Los Angeles Sparks players did not receive their ballots, which teams are responsible for distributing.

More:

www.espn.com/wnba/story/_...

media.title: Sources: Less than half of WNBA players voted for ASG starters
media.description: Only about 85 of the WNBA's roughly 180 players -- or a little less than half -- submitted voting ballots for starters ahead of this month's WNBA All-Star Game in Chicago, sources told ESPN on Thursday.
